items.name: Generative-Motion-Planner
items.description: A framework for motion planning using generative machine learning methods

items.name: Transcriptomic-Crosstalk-using-Tsetlin-Machine
items.description: Tsetlin Machine-based framework for analyzing transcriptomic crosstalk. Uses interpretable rule-based learning, enabling transparent and biologically meaningful insights beyond black-box models.

items.name: ADAPTIVE-MULTI-TASK-PREDICTION-SYSTEM-USING-HYBRID-FEATURE-SELECTION-AND-EXPLAINABLE-AI
items.description: The Adaptive Multi-Task Prediction System is an intelligent, domain-independent machine learning framework designed to automate predictive analytics for multiple types of structured datasets. The main objective of this project is to simplify machine learning processes by reducing manual intervention and improving prediction transparency.

items.name: Explainable-Machine-Learning-Framework-For-Medical-Disease-Prediction
items.description: Explainable Machine Learning Framework for Medical Disease Prediction using SHAP and Streamlit

items.name: caretSDM
items.description: caretSDM applies a geoprocessing framework to the caret machine learning package, facilitating the access of Species Distribution Modeling community to state-of-the-art methods.

items.name: Malware-Detection-frame-work-using-ML-and-analysis-of-files
items.description: The Malware Detection Framework using Machine Learning is a cybersecurity-based system designed to identify and classify malicious files by analyzing their characteristics and behavior. Traditional signature-based antivirus systems often fail to detect new or unknown (zero-day) threats.

items.name: Diabetes-Complication-Risk-Prediction-Model
items.description: A machine learning project that predicts diabetes-related complications such as cardiovascular disease, kidney disease, and neuropathy using patient clinical data. The project includes data cleaning, preprocessing, feature engineering, exploratory data analysis, and a multi-label classification framework.

items.name: LightGBM
items.description: A fast, distributed, high performance gradient boosting (GBT, GBDT, GBRT, GBM or MART) framework based on decision tree algorithms, used for ranking, classification and many other machine learning tasks.

items.name: Prediction-and-Weather-Driven-Analysis-of-Declining-Bird-Species-in-Karnataka
items.description: Machine learning framework for retrospective classification of bird population trends in Karnataka using eBird and climate data (2018–2024).

items.name: Customer-Churn-Prediction-and-Machine-Learning-Model-Evaluation-System
items.description: Developed a customer churn prediction system using machine learning. Implemented multiple classification models including Logistic Regression, SVM, KNN, Random Forest, and Gradient Boosting. Evaluated models using accuracy and F1-score, and built a comparison framework to select the best-performing model for churn prediction.

items.name: frogbox

items.name: Compensatory-Mutation-Classifier-of-HIV-1-Tat-Protein

items.name: Machine-Learning-Categorical-Data
items.description: This repository demonstrates Random Sample Imputation for categorical missing data within a machine learning pipeline. Using house price data, the notebook compares the original and imputed distributions of features like garage quality. It provides a robust framework for maintaining statistical variance while handling gaps.
